MISSING_FIELDS: All required fields must be filled in.
INVALID_ROLE: Role must be STUDENT or INSTRUCTOR.
INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
WEAK_PASSWORD: Password must be at least 8 characters.
EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.
UNAUTHORIZED: You must be logged in to continue.
FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to do this.
USER_NOT_FOUND: No user found with that email or ID.
ALREADY_MEMBER: This student is already in the group.
NOT_STUDENT: Only students can be added as group members.
ASSIGNEE_NOT_MEMBER: The assignee must be a member of this group.
INVALID_STATUS: Status must be TODO, IN_PROGRESS, or DONE.
INVALID_REQUEST_STATUS: Request status must be OPEN or RESOLVED.
MESSAGE_REQUIRED: Support request message cannot be empty.
USER_ID_OR_EMAIL: Provide either a userId or an email.
SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
